memberdef.type: < div class="container mt-4">< div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">< h1 > Model.Name</h1 >< div >< a asp-action="Edit" asp-route-id="@Model.Id" class="btn btn-warning"> Edit</a >< a asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-secondary"> Back to List</a ></div ></div >
memberdef.definition: < div class="container mt-4">< div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">< h1 > Model.Name</h1 >< div >< a asp-action="Edit" asp-route-id="@Model.Id" class="btn btn-warning"> Edit</a >< a asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-secondary"> Back to List</a ></div ></div > if
memberdef.name: if
